zh.Creslow, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾可萊斯洛福
zh.Pitstone, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾皮史同
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Stretley於1289年出生在英國時，他的父親Hugh de Stratele26歲，母親Agnes de Neyrnuit22歲。他和Elizabeth Tedmarsh至少有7個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.Creslow, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾可萊斯洛福
zh-hans.Pitstone, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾皮史同
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Stretley于1289年出生在英国时，他的父亲Hugh de Stratele26岁，母亲Agnes de Neyrnuit22岁。他和Elizabeth Tedmarsh至少有7个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stretley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Stretley was born in 1289, in England, his father, Hugh de Stratele, was 26 and his mother, Agnes de Neyrnuit, was 22. He had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Elizabeth Tedmarsh.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Stretley est né en 1289, à Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Stratele, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Neyrnuit, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec Elizabeth Tedmarsh.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Stretley 1289 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Stratele 26 und seine Mutter Agnes de Neyrnuit 22. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Tedmarsh mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Stretley è nato il nel 1289 nel England, il suo padre, Hugh de Stratele, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Neyrnuit, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con Elizabeth Tedmarsh.

ja.Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイア
ja.Creslow, Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアクレスロウ
ja.Pitstone, Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアピトストーン
ja.lifeSummary: John de Stretleyが1289年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Hugh de Strateleは26歳，母Agnes de Neyrnuitは22歳であった。彼はElizabeth Tedmarshとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Stretley(이)가 1289년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Stratele(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Neyrnuit(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Tedmarsh(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Stretley nasceu em 1289, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Stratele, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Neyrnuit, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com Elizabeth Tedmarsh.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Stretley родился в 1289 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Stratele было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Neyrnuit, 22. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Elizabeth Tedmarsh.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Stretley nació en 1289, en Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Stratele, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes de Neyrnuit, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija con Elizabeth Tedmarsh.
